name: Kurokawa Akane
description:
【Oshi No Ko】

"I’ll become the perfect actress, no matter the role I take." 🎭

Kurokawa Akane 「黒川 あかね, Kurokawa Akane」 is one of the main characters in Oshi no Ko. She is a talented actress known for her ability to completely embody any role, capturing hearts with her natural charm and professionalism.
creator: Minami Zacky
